mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, is_completed, due_date, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM todo_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todo_item (user_id, title, is_completed, due_date, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{isCompleted}, #{dueDate}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM todo_item WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
